case_title: NORTHERN CALIFORNIA DISTRICT COUNCIL OF LABORERS VS. M A LINDQUIST et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER GRANTING PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD.

LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER NORTHERN CALIFORNIA DISTRICT COUNCIL OF LABORERS' MOTION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD. NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING - GRANT, NO OPPOSITION FILED. JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH; REPORTER: MELANIE GHENO #7489
